name: integration_13k_users_but_only_35_mrr_is_it_time
method: 1.3k users, but only $35 MRR. Is it time to kill my project? I've been running **RankMyCV** for a few months now. The growth actually surprised me—I just hit **1,356 total users** and I'm getting arou

phases.name: inventory
steps: list all 47 live apps from OPS/DEPLOYMENT_URLS.md
pull user engagement signals from firebase if available

phases.name: diagnosis
steps: score each app on: paywall exists (0/1), upgrade CTA present (0/1), free tier too generous (heuristic), pro features clearly differentiated (heuristic)
rank by traffic × leakage score = conversion opportunity

phases.name: patch_generation
steps: for NO_PAYWALL apps: generate Stripe Payment Link + inject checkout snippet via payment_integrator.py --wire-app
for SOFT_GATE apps: generate harder paywall patch (limit free to 1 use, require email, add trial timer)
for all apps: generate upgrade CTA HTML block with data-upgrade attribute

phases.name: report
steps: write LEDGER/FREEMIUM_AUDIT_{date}.md with per-app scores + patches applied
update OPS/STRIPE_PRODUCTS.md with new payment links
append to OPS/KPI_DASHBOARD.md: monetized app count delta
